stemHtml: For an aircraft operating a medical flight, which radio procedure is correct?

options.a: MAYDAY MAYDAY MEDICAL before the call sign; priority over all except distress.
options.b: PAN PAN PAN before the call sign; priority over all except urgency.
options.c: PAN PAN MEDICAL before the call sign; priority over all messages except distress.
options.d: MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY before the call sign; priority over all except urgency.
